summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with hands-on experience researching, prototyping, and deploying generative AI systems into production. Built a real-time LLM-powered interview platform using Anthropic Claude and a production RAG developer tool using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini and HuggingFace embeddings. Experienced working across the full AI deployment lifecycle from proof-of-concept to live product, with a track record of communicating technical results clearly to non-technical stakeholders.

skills.languages: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: Large Language Models (LLMs), Generative AI, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, HuggingFace Transformers, LangChain, Prompt Engineering, NLP, Fine-tuning, Vector Embeddings, Semantic Search
skills.infra: FastAPI, Express.js, Node.js, RESTful APIs, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, AWS, GCP, Railway, Vercel, Git
